error_signature: data should be a string, Buffer or Uint8Array
title: Http Request node data type error
symptom: The Http Request node fails with the error 'data should be a string, Buffer or Uint8Array', leading to confusion about the source of the issue.
applies_when: One or more fields have expressions resolving to non-string types
not_this_if: All fields are correctly set to string types
Error does not occur in the Http Request node
root_cause: The error occurs when one of the parameters in the Http Request node is expected to be a string but receives a value of a different type, such as boolean or array. This can lead to misleading error messages that do not clearly indicate which field is causing the issue.
fix_steps: Review all parameters in the Http Request node
Check for any expressions that resolve to non-string types
Correct any fields that are not set to string types
agent_instruction: Ensure all parameters in the Http Request node are set to valid string types.
